series_metadata.series_description: Copies of all pleadings, journal entries, dockets and paper or written exhibits, records, reports, documents and a list of non-paper evidence for each LCC case appealed to the Court of Common Pleas. In accordnace with ORC 119.12.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Consolidate with all related files into a single case file. Retain until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals and then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
